title: Ancient Structures: Edo Japan [Datapack]
description: A datapack that adds buildings from Edo Period Japan to the mod Ancient Structures. The datpack continues structures that players can interact with and discover hidden secerts.
body:
# 🏯 Ancient Structures: Edo Japan Ancient Structures is a Minecraft mod that adds handcrafted cultural structures from various historical civilizations from different eras directly into your world. The mod aims to display the [Dawn of Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/dawn-of-time-builder-edition) ecosystem, showcasing the architectural potential of [Dawn of Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/dawn-of-time-builder-edition) blocks and the animated armor models from [Armor of the Ages](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-of-the-ages) through immersive world generation. ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Edo Japan This datapack adds various lone structures inspired from the Edo Period (1603 AD to 1868 AD). Which means you can have your samurai meet a cowboy and it be historical accurate. These additional builds follow the core goals of Ancient Structure by enriching survival gameplay, worldbuilding, atmosphere, and challenges giving the player a chance to find hidden loot and other surprises. ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Dependencies This datapack requires the following mods: - [Dawn of Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/dawn-of-time) - [Armor of the Ages](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-of-the-ages) - [Fusion (Connected Textures)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures) - [YetAnotherConfig (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - [Redden's Stone Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/mod/reddens-stone-lanterns) ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Biome Compatibility ### Currently Supported: - Vanilla ### Planned: - Oh The Biomes We've Gone - Biomes O'Plenty - Terralith - Regions Unexplored ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## What's Next? We’re planning to expand the datapack with: - Decorative buildings - Useful survival structures - Dungeons - Trail chambers - Biome Support New releases are coming soon — stay tuned! ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Our Mods Ecosystem

![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Credits - **TheGoldenWorld** – Creator of Ancient Structures and lead builder - **Poulpinou** – Lead project manager of the Dawn of Time mod family
